sourceText: This clearly states the fundamental purpose and core role of government, centering it on the protection of liberty.

Witnessing the brutal reality of my homeland being plundered by Japanese imperialism and the sacrifice of many comrades who fought for independence through armed struggle was a profound pain. During imprisonment, I endured severe torture and harsh conditions.

Even in prison, I did not lose sight of my ideals, authoring 'The Theory of East Asian Peace.' I steadfastly held onto my convictions for national independence and peace in East Asia, striving to leave hope for future generations.
Death comes to all men inevitably; do not cling to life like a dog or a horse.
Death is inevitable for all; do not cling to life greedily like a dog or a horse, but face death righteously.
To sacrifice oneself for the country is loyalty as a subject; to sacrifice oneself for the people is loyalty as a father.
Dedication to the country is the duty of a subject; dedication to the people is the duty of a father.
Even the greatest general may fail to defeat the enemy at times; how could I possibly fail to defeat the enemy when I reach this point?
Just as even the most outstanding general can sometimes be defeated, I too will do my best to overcome any difficulties I face.
Gender-based limitations in a patriarchal society, intense power struggles within the court, opposition and conspiracies from rivals, and tragedies involving her own children.
Exceptional political acumen, bold personnel policies, promotion of capable individuals, implementation of reformist policies, and seizing and maintaining power through strong will and determination.
Heaven under my rule shall see all.
Signifies her powerful control and insight, implying she perceives everything under her dominion.
